title: Student — Settings & Security
content:
Overview


The Settings page allows students to manage their profile, password, two-factor authentication, notification preferences, and theme.



Profile Settings


The Profile section displays:


  • Display Name: The name shown throughout the portal. Click Edit to change it
  • Email Address: Shows a "Verified" badge — cannot be changed by the student
  • Account Created: The date the account was registered

Editing Profile:


  1. Click Edit next to Display Name
  2. Enter a new display name and optionally update avatar initials (2 letters)
  3. Click Save


Security — Password


  1. Click Change next to Password
  2. Enter Current Password
  3. Enter New Password (minimum 8 characters)
  4. Enter Confirm New Password
  5. Click Update

A "Last changed" date is displayed showing when the password was last updated.



Security — Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)


Shows whether 2FA is currently enabled or disabled. Students can toggle it on or off.


Enabling 2FA:


  1. Click Enable 2FA
  2. Step 1 — Scan QR: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator, Authy, or any TOTP app. A manual entry key is also provided
  3. Step 2 — Verify: Enter the 6-digit code from the authenticator app
  4. Step 3 — Backup Codes: Save the displayed recovery codes in a safe place

Disabling 2FA:


  1. Click Disable 2FA
  2. Enter current password and the 6-digit code from the authenticator app
  3. Click Disable 2FA

If the student loses access to their authenticator and has no backup codes, they must contact their school admin or Tklesson support.



Notification Settings


Three toggle switches control notifications:


  • Email Notifications: Course updates and progress reports
  • Quiz Reminders: Alerts for incomplete quizzes
  • Study Goals: Daily and weekly progress updates

All are enabled by default and can be toggled off individually.



Preferences


Theme: Choose between Light and Dark mode. The change applies immediately.



Key Talking Points for Agents


  • "You can change your display name anytime from Profile Settings."
  • "When setting up 2FA, save your backup codes somewhere safe — they won't be shown again."
  • "Notification toggles let you control which emails and alerts you receive."
  • "Dark mode is available in Preferences if you prefer a darker interface."
  • "If you lose your authenticator, your school admin or our support team can help."
